Container.Name: x265-butler
Container.Overview:
x265-butler reclaims disk space on unRAID by automatically transcoding video files to HEVC (x265). Scans library shares for non-x265 files, transcodes them in the background using ffmpeg, tracks results in a dashboard, and never re-encodes the same file twice. Lighter-weight than Tdarr / FileFlows / Unmanic.
M2 v2.0 Polish + Power closes 2026-05-21: Stats + Dashboard / UI Redesign / Encoder-Benchmark with Pareto-Frontier / Encoder-Profile-Editor / Multi-Share / Storage-Analyzer / Auto-Scan-on-Change.
See full release notes for v2.13.0 highlights: https://github.com/masterjb/unraid-templates/blob/main/x265-butler/RELEASE-NOTES.md
Live release feed (all versions): https://gitlab.com/MisterJB/x265-butler/-/releases
Container.Description: HEVC transcoding for unRAID — set-and-forget background re-encode of your library shares to x265. Dashboard, encoder benchmarks, profile editor, auto-scan, multi-share. See RELEASE-NOTES.md for the full v2.13.0 changelog (M2 v2.0 Polish + Power close). Current changelog: https://gitlab.com/MisterJB/x265-butler/-/releases

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the x265-butler dashboard

Config.Name: Library
Config.Description: Path containing video files to scan + transcode
